key_drivers: Iran war / Strait of Hormuz closure creating major oil supply shock (~8M bpd disruption), driving CL strongly bullish
Rising real yields (DFII10 ~1.78-1.91%, up >5bps) and hawkish central bank repricing weighing heavily on equities and gold
BoJ hawkish lean (April hike on table) + ECB hike bets rising driving JPY and EUR strength vs USD
Risk-off environment (VIX 24.06, MOVE 84.88) with widening HY OAS (~327bp) crushing small-cap and broad equity bias
China slowdown (NBS PMI 49.0, 4-month low) and risk-off hammering AUD despite RBA hike to 4.10%

stale_sources: DFII10 (FRED lags 1-2 days, used TradingKey/AhaSignals fallback ~1.78-1.91%)
BAMLH0A0HYM2 (FRED lags, used Aristotle Funds/MEXC fallback ~327bp)
